sizing_rule.note: Optimal f determined by correlation coefficient between systems and individual mathematical expectations. Allocations can sum >100% when correlation < 1.0. Requires positive expectancy per system. No optimal f when expectancy is negative.

source_rule_text: Position sizing can be allocated across multiple correlated market systems where individual percentage allocations may exceed 100% when combined, with optimal sizing dependent on the correlation coefficient between systems and the mathematical expectation of each system.
